---
title: 'AAA...'
date: '2014-01-18T16:00:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6580562681309432478'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/aaa.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Answers'
---

AAA called to set up an appointment to do a phone screen interview. I set that for Wed 1/22. I REALLY hope they pay enough to leave WF... and that they are better to work for.
